title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Industries Advisory Limited:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries Advisory Limited!
